global-Erasmus+ Staff Mobility within Europe

With Erasmus+ KA131, administrative or academic staff of Higher Education Institutions can take part in a Staff Mobility at KHAS. The mobility can comprise of training, job shadowing and  or experience and best practices sharing. Training Mobility between the staff members of two HEIs holding an Erasmus Charter is possible without an inter-institutional agreement. If your home university holds an Erasmus Charter, you can apply for a training mobility.

Colleagues who are interested in visiting KHAS as incoming staff should get in touch with the related academic or administrative department directly to organize their visit. Prospective academic visitors are recommended to contact with the exchange coordinators in the departments whereas prospective administrative visitors are recommended to contact with KHAS Erasmus+ and Exchange Office:

[email protected]

.

For your teaching or training period at KHAS, your home university will be responsible for providing you Erasmus+ financial grant. Therefore, you need to contact your Erasmus+ Office to find out the details
